headline: Can Jabil's Manufacturing Expansion in India Boost Growth Prospects?
summary: JBL expands in India with a new Pune facility, boosting capacity, workforce and partnerships to support long-term growth in manufacturing and AI infrastructure.

headline: SANM Rides on Strong Operating Margin Growth: Will the Trend Persist?
summary: Sanmina's operating margin jumps to 6.4% as ZT systems, AI infrastructure demand and cost discipline fuel profit growth. Can it continue?

headline: Jabil (JBL) Stock After 7x Five-Year Return Is There Still Value In The Price
summary: If you are looking at Jabil and wondering whether the current share price reflects its underlying worth, this article will walk through the key valuation angles that matter most. The stock last closed at US$371.88, with returns of 11.7% over the past month, 54.7% year to date, and 81.9% over the past year. It did decline 1.3% over the last week and has delivered a very large 3 year return and an even larger 5 year return of more than 7x. Recent news coverage around Jabil has largely focused...

headline: Jabil Expands Manufacturing Capacity in India
summary: PUNE, India, June 19, 2026--Jabil Inc. (NYSE: JBL), a global leader in engineering, supply chain, and manufacturing solutions, today announced the opening of a new factory in Pune, marking a significant expansion of the company’s India manufacturing capacity.
